events.event_description: First U.S. diplomatic mission established to the Papal States, with Jacob L. Martin presenting credentials as Chargé d'Affaires.

evidence.quote: Jacob L Martin, Chargé d'Affaires. Appointed: 1848-04-07. Credentials presented: 1848-08-19. Died at post on 1848-08-26. Note: Commissioned to the Papal States.

events.event_description: Last Minister Resident Rufus King left post; the U.S. mission to the Papal States was closed and not replaced, ending diplomatic representation.

evidence.quote: Rufus2 King, Minister Resident. Appointed: 1863-10-07. Credentials presented: 1864-01-08. Left post on 1867-08-17. Note: Commissioned during a recess of the Senate; recommissioned on January 18, 1864, after confirmation. Commissioned as Minister Resident at Rome.

events.event_description: Myron Charles Taylor appointed as Personal Representative of the President to the Holy See, establishing an informal liaison-level presence after a 72-year gap.

evidence.quote: Myron Charles Taylor, Personal Representative of the President. Credentials presented: 1939-12-23. Left post: 1950-01-18.

events.event_description: Personal Representative Myron Charles Taylor left post with no successor appointed, ending U.S. diplomatic representation to the Holy See.

evidence.quote: Myron Charles Taylor, Personal Representative of the President. Credentials presented: 1939-12-23. Left post: 1950-01-18.

events.event_description: Henry Cabot Lodge appointed as Personal Representative of the President to the Holy See, resuming informal liaison-level representation after a 20-year gap.

evidence.quote: Henry Cabot Lodge, Personal Representative of the President. Credentials presented: 1970-06-05. Left post: 1977-07-06.

events.event_description: William A. Wilson, previously Personal Representative, presented credentials as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary, marking the establishment of a full U.S. Embassy to the Holy See.

evidence.quote: William A Wilson, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1984-03-08. Credentials presented: 1984-04-09. Left post on 1986-07-18.
